pages.title: Spatial Analysis - LOKASI
versionHints: Page title 'Spatial Analysis - LOKASI' and pathname '/intelligence'
Presence of controls: Analysis, Dataset Explorer, Dataset Management, Analysis Job Queue, Draw Polygon, Recenter Map, Search
Visible map label or search result text: '4 Street'

llm.purpose: Interactive map-based spatial analysis workspace for running analyses against datasets, managing datasets, and interacting with map controls and jobs.
llm.capability_summary: Provides map controls (recenter, draw polygon), dataset discovery and management entry points (Dataset Explorer, Dataset Management), analysis execution and monitoring (Analysis, Analysis Job Queue), search and account/settings access. Visible map context shows a street label or search result ('4 Street').
llm.why_this_page: This is the primary interface for users to perform spatial analysis workflows: selecting areas on the map, choosing datasets, launching analysis jobs, and monitoring job status/results on a map canvas.

likely_features.name: Analysis launcher
likely_features.description: Button/entry to create and run spatial analyses against selected datasets or map extents.
likely_features.why_this_feature: Presence of an 'Analysis' control and 'Analysis Job Queue' indicates ability to run and queue analytical tasks.
important_actions: Open Analysis flow
Start a new analysis job with a selected area/dataset
Verify job appears in Analysis Job Queue

likely_features.name: Analysis Job Queue
likely_features.description: List or queue UI where running/completed analysis jobs are monitored.
likely_features.why_this_feature: Explicit 'Analysis Job Queue' control is visible.
important_actions: Open queue and confirm job states (running, completed, failed)
Inspect job details/logs
Cancel or retry a job if controls exist

likely_features.name: Dataset Explorer
likely_features.description: Browse and select datasets to use in analyses or to display on the map.
likely_features.why_this_feature: 'Dataset Explorer' button is present alongside dataset management tools.
important_actions: Open Dataset Explorer and verify dataset list loads
Select a dataset and confirm it can be added to map or used in analysis

likely_features.name: Dataset Management
likely_features.description: Administrative UI for creating/updating/deleting datasets used by analyses.
likely_features.why_this_feature: 'Dataset Management' control suggests dataset CRUD capabilities.
important_actions: Open Dataset Management and verify dataset CRUD operations
Ensure permissions/errors surface correctly when modifying datasets

likely_features.name: Map selection tool (Draw Polygon)
likely_features.description: Tool to draw polygon on map to define analysis area or filter data.
likely_features.why_this_feature: 'Draw Polygon' control is visible, implying spatial selection functionality.
important_actions: Use Draw Polygon to create an area and verify coordinates/geometry returned
Run analysis using the drawn polygon as input and confirm results

likely_features.name: Recenter Map
likely_features.description: Control to reset map view to a default center or focused feature.
important_actions: Pan/zoom map then click Recenter Map and confirm view resets as expected

likely_features.name: Search (geocoding/address)
likely_features.description: Search bar to find addresses or places and recenter map to results.
likely_features.why_this_feature: A 'Search' control exists and page contains text '4 Street' suggesting a search result or label.
important_actions: Search for an address (e.g., '4 Street') and confirm map centers and highlights result
Verify result metadata/displayed label

likely_features.name: UI controls: Collapse, Settings, My Account
likely_features.description: Collapse sidebar, access settings and account-related actions.
likely_features.why_this_feature: Buttons for 'Collapse', 'Settings', and 'My Account' are present.
important_actions: Toggle Collapse to hide/show side panels
Open Settings and My Account to verify navigation/modal behavior

candidate_next_actions.action: Open the Analysis flow and attempt to create a new analysis job
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Validates core workflow: job creation UI, required inputs, and submission behavior

candidate_next_actions.action: Draw a polygon on the map and run an analysis using that polygon as the input area
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Verifies spatial selection integrates with analysis engine and that results render on the map

candidate_next_actions.action: Open Analysis Job Queue and confirm the newly submitted job appears with correct status and details
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Ensures job lifecycle is tracked and visible to users (critical for asynchronous analyses)

candidate_next_actions.action: Open Dataset Explorer, select a dataset, and add it to the map or use it in an analysis
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Confirms dataset discovery and binding to analysis workflows

candidate_next_actions.action: Use Search to find '4 Street' (or another address) and verify the map recenters and label/marker appears
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Checks geocoding/search integration and map centering behavior indicated by visible text '4 Street'

candidate_next_actions.action: Click Recenter Map after panning/zooming and verify map returns to expected default or focused extent
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Validates map control behavior and expected view state reset

candidate_next_actions.action: Open Dataset Management and attempt a dataset create/update/delete operation (if permitted)
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Tests administrative dataset workflows that affect analyses and storage of source data

candidate_next_actions.action: Toggle Collapse and observe that side panels or toolbars hide/show without breaking map interactions
candidate_next_actions.why_this_action: Checks UI stability and layout responsiveness during user interactions

attempts.label: Inspect right-side / overflow area for edit/filter control

attempts.input_text: Check the row's right-hand controls, overflow/ellipsis menu, and any inline saved-filter card for an edit icon, 'Edit filter' menu entry, or disabled/hidden indicator. Report exact visible text and whether it's interactive.

attempts.label: Open overflow menu for dataset row
attempts.target_text: Three-dot/ellipsis overflow menu for 'Household Expenditure Village Jakarta 2024' row
attempts.input_text: Click the row's three-dot/ellipsis overflow menu to open the context menu and reveal the 'Edit filter' entry (or edit icon).
attempts.expected_signal: Overflow/context menu opens for the dataset row and shows an 'Edit filter' entry, edit icon, or inline saved-filter actions; menu items are visible and interactive.
attempts.rationale: Direct row selection failed previously. The row's overflow/ellipsis menu often contains the 'Edit filter' action; clicking it should expose the edit/filter entry without changing dataset selection state.

globalFeatures.name: Analysis launcher
globalFeatures.description: Button/entry to create and run spatial analyses against selected datasets or map extents.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: Presence of an 'Analysis' control and 'Analysis Job Queue' indicates ability to run and queue analytical tasks.
important_actions: Open Analysis flow
Start a new analysis job with a selected area/dataset
Verify job appears in Analysis Job Queue

globalFeatures.name: Analysis Job Queue
globalFeatures.description: List or queue UI where running/completed analysis jobs are monitored.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: Explicit 'Analysis Job Queue' control is visible.
important_actions: Open queue and confirm job states (running, completed, failed)
Inspect job details/logs
Cancel or retry a job if controls exist

globalFeatures.name: Dataset Explorer
globalFeatures.description: Browse and select datasets to use in analyses or to display on the map.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: 'Dataset Explorer' button is present alongside dataset management tools.
important_actions: Open Dataset Explorer and verify dataset list loads
Select a dataset and confirm it can be added to map or used in analysis

globalFeatures.name: Dataset Management
globalFeatures.description: Administrative UI for creating/updating/deleting datasets used by analyses.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: 'Dataset Management' control suggests dataset CRUD capabilities.
important_actions: Open Dataset Management and verify dataset CRUD operations
Ensure permissions/errors surface correctly when modifying datasets

globalFeatures.name: Map selection tool (Draw Polygon)
globalFeatures.description: Tool to draw polygon on map to define analysis area or filter data.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: 'Draw Polygon' control is visible, implying spatial selection functionality.
important_actions: Use Draw Polygon to create an area and verify coordinates/geometry returned
Run analysis using the drawn polygon as input and confirm results

globalFeatures.name: Recenter Map
globalFeatures.description: Control to reset map view to a default center or focused feature.
important_actions: Pan/zoom map then click Recenter Map and confirm view resets as expected

globalFeatures.name: Search (geocoding/address)
globalFeatures.description: Search bar to find addresses or places and recenter map to results.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: A 'Search' control exists and page contains text '4 Street' suggesting a search result or label.
important_actions: Search for an address (e.g., '4 Street') and confirm map centers and highlights result
Verify result metadata/displayed label

globalFeatures.name: UI controls: Collapse, Settings, My Account
globalFeatures.description: Collapse sidebar, access settings and account-related actions.
globalFeatures.why_this_feature: Buttons for 'Collapse', 'Settings', and 'My Account' are present.
important_actions: Toggle Collapse to hide/show side panels
Open Settings and My Account to verify navigation/modal behavior
